success:planner.content:
coordination patterns in multi-agent systems
agent communication protocols
orchestration vs choreography

success:writer.content: Multi-agent systems coordinate primarily through orchestration (a central planner assigns work) and choreography (agents react to shared events). Communication uses typed message passing, and handoffs preserve task context. These patterns trade central control against resilience and scalability.
